board_csa_architect.notes: In-memory counter per tempToken. Aligns with REQ-L6-07 rate limiting pattern.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Critical. 6-digit OTP has 1M combos. Without rate limit a stolen tempToken enables brute force. Strongly approve.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Failed attempts logged to audit_log. tempToken invalidation after 5 failures is clean.
